name: polymarket_tool
description: Trade weather contracts on Polymarket using NOAA/Open-Meteo data edge. Supports market scanning, analysis, paper/live trading, position tracking, and order management. Trading data is stored in a dedicated database, not in memory. Actions: get_markets, analyze_market, scan_opportunities, execute_trade, get_positions, check_settlements, get_performance, pause_trading, get_balance, cancel_order, get_open_orders.

action.description: Action to perform. Read-only: get_markets, analyze_market, get_positions, get_performance, get_balance, get_open_orders. Trading (requires POLYMARKET_ENABLED=true): scan_opportunities, execute_trade, check_settlements, pause_trading, cancel_order.

market_id.description: Polymarket market ID (required for analyze_market, execute_trade, check_settlements)

size.description: Trade size in USDC (for execute_trade, overrides Kelly sizing)

station_id.description: ICAO airport code override (e.g., KJFK, KORD, KLAX) for analyze_market. If omitted, the tool will try to infer the station from the market question.

threshold.description: Contract threshold value override (e.g., 70 for 'Will temp exceed 70F?') for analyze_market.

comparison.description: Whether the contract is for above or below the threshold (default: above)

bankroll.description: Current bankroll in USDC (required for execute_trade, used for Kelly position sizing)

settlement_price.description: Settlement price for check_settlements (0.0 for NO win, 1.0 for YES win)
